feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP PI/PO migration from any-DB (MS SQL server) to HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are planning to migrate from ECC (EHP8) application to S/4 HANA. And we have SAP PI/PO system integrated with ECC. So we are in doubt whether to migrate our SAP PI/PO application from MS SQL Server database to HANA database. As far as I know, unlike ECC or BW, we don't have huge demand for transactions or reports which are usually time-consuming or data-intensive in PI/PO. All PI objects are always in the runtime cache. In production environments, we archive messages frequently. So if we migrate PI/PO database from any DB (MS SQL DB) to HANA DB I don't think it will make much difference. So can anyone please suggest our ideas.

Thanks,

Praveen

entry.title: SAP MM Career
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working as a sourcing and Procurement Engineer with 7+ years experience in a startup company.I am not used any ERP tools previously.I am working all the data in excel only.But when I am looking for a job in a other company they required experience in ERP tool.

Can I learn SAP MM module and Need to get certification for that or what I should do please give me a clear view

entry.title: solman_setup - Database hosts when connecting a managed system
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

our systems are running on Hana database. We have 2 or 3 servers per SID as we have configured HSR. When connecting newly installed systems to the Solution Manager, I observe very seldom behavior that defies any logic in the steps Assign Product and Assign Diagnostics Agent. 

Sometimes I only see one database host in the step Assign Product. This is usually due to missing SLD data and when I make sure all DB servers have correctly transferred SLD data, it is fixed and the servers are present there. However, when I see all DB servers correctly in this point, my expectation is to see them also in the step Assign Diagnostics Agent! However, I see all application servers and all DB servers very rarely in this point! It seems to be independent from the point Assign Product and I did not find anything specific, that makes DB Servers appear or disappear from the point Assign Diagnostics Agent!

Could you please kindly explain how this works and most importantly - provide me an answer what exactly do I have to do, in order to see the DB Servers also in the point Assign Diagnostics Agent.

Many thanks for your help and advice!

entry.title: How can I see the TDS and GST reports plant-wise not company-wise in Standard SAP
entry.content:
We have a Company Code 3000 and plant under company code 3100 and 3300.

Now we would like to see the TDS and GST Report separately for 3100 & 3300. How Can we see this plant-wise in standard SAP?

entry.title: Defect Tracking API data posted from CPI to S4 shown in Table QMFE but not in TCode QF21
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

There is one requirement to post the data using the defect tracking API which is successful from CPI to S4 with below details

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_defect/srvd_a2x/sap/defect/0001/Defect

<Defect>

<Defect_Type>

<DefectInternalID>00000000004</DefectInternalID>

<DefectText>test1</DefectText>

<DefectCodeCatalog>9</DefectCodeCatalog>

<DefectCode>1</DefectCode>

<DefectCodeGroup>QM-E</DefectCodeGroup>

<ManufacturingOrder>000012</ManufacturingOrder>

<InspectionLot>40000000008</InspectionLot>

<DefectCategory>01</DefectCategory>

</Defect_Type>

</Defect>

Even tried with all the 50+ fields of the API populated with the functional data provided but still the same issue.

The post is successful and we can see the data triggered from CPI in S4 in the actual table QMFE and even the GET API call also shows the values posted but its not reflecting in the actual TCODE QF21

If the functional owner is entering any data manually its also available in both backend table QMFE and TCODE QF21 but its not available in GET API call.

Does anyone know any case like this where the API is not working as expected.


Thanks,

Ahmed

entry.title: Can we replace the existing FSV with new one OR Can we overwrite FSV's ?
entry.content:
I copied an existing FSV and created a new one with a different name. After making changes to the new FSV, I'm trying to overwrite the original FSV from which the new one was created. Is this possible?

#FSV

#FSE2

#OB58

SAP HANA 

SAP Community

entry.title: How to automatically bulk create virtual tables dynamically in code?
entry.content: Hi we are accessing many tables and views from a remote system and wondered how to bulk create virtual tables?

entry.title: Can we overwrite the changes in existing FSV?
entry.content:
I created a new hierarchy (FSV) based on an existing one. After modifying the new FSV, I attempted to copy those changes back to the original using the "Copy To" menu. However, I encountered an error message stating "Hierarchy ID already exists." While I understand that accounts can be manually added to the existing FSV, I'm wondering if it's possible to overwrite the existing FSV entirely with the new one?

 

#FSV

#SAP HANA

entry.title: Cannot install SAP Host Agent hana installation
entry.content:
Hi,

I am installing HANA 2.00.065 on an HA node but it fails with below message.. 

 

Output line 71: Installing SAP Host Agent version 7.22.57..

Output line 72: Installation failed

Output line 73: error installing

Output line 74: Cannot create Instance

Output line 75: Cannot install SAP Host Agent

Please suggest

entry.title: Recursive Bom Periodic Unit Price
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to analyze Periodic Unit Price for production material. For one line we are not able to figure out from where this value is coming from. We noticed that for production of material  A is consumed the same material A. Could you please explain how periodic unit price is calculated in that case? what is the formula behind it in SAP?

entry.title: Remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA, Call function 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' is throwing error - Not permitted in restricted scope, what is the other way to remove zeroes and then add zeroes as per the data type?

entry.title: How to settle AuC to statistical internal order
entry.content:
We have projects managed in SAP-PS, where each SAP-PS project collects construction costs and is settled to an Asset Under Construction (AUC). Once the project is completed and sold, we need to settle the AUC to an internal statistical order to calculate specific costs required by the financial team. Ultimately, these costs should be posted to a cost center.

To achieve this, we use the settlement rule ORD with the statistical internal order (IO) number. However, when settling through CJ88, the system directly settles the AUC to the cost center of the IO and does not post to the statistical IO at all. Is there a way to ensure that the system posts to the statistical IO?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Replicate transactions from one schema to another
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We have a request to replicate one of our schemas, and then at the end of each day replicate all the transactions that happened in the "original" schema. We cannot do a backup and restore as other data will be captured/imported into the "new" schema. 

Are there any tools/applications that can do this? Or does anyone have any ideas on how to go about this? 

Version: SAP B1 version 10, for HANA. FP 2208 

Thanks all,
Jerusha

entry.title: SAP Intercompany Settlement process in Condition contract in S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am just trying for some documentation on Intercompany settlement process in condition contract in S4 Hana.

if anyone has any some documentation on this process, please let me know.

 

Thank you,

entry.title: Enabling cross container access for Nodejs function in SAP Hana XS advanced
entry.content:
Hello,

Has anyone tried accessing nodejs functions from different container in SAP HANA webide (XS advanced)? There are posts about cross container access for database objects but couldn't find one for nodejs or XS functions. 

Thanks,

entry.title: 10709: Connection failed connect' failed, rc=111:Connection refused
entry.content:
Hi,

While trying to connect HANA database using hdbsql on the server where HANA DB is installed, i am getting below error. 

$hdbsql -i 00 -u SYSTEM -p ******* -d DBNAME..

* -10709: Connection failed (RTE:[89006] System call 'connect' failed, rc=111:Connection refused ([::1]:55978 -> localhost:30015))

 

Please suggest

entry.title: FAIL: process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running
entry.content:
Hi,

While trying to start HANA DB using HDB start, i am getting below error..

 

FAIL: process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running

entry.title: HCM integrates with which other functional modules like MM,PP,SD,ETC...?And in which senerios?
entry.content: HCM is integrate with officially FICO but what about others! Try to explain with example.

entry.title: Can anyone explain me 'profitability analysis' wrt SAP PS?
"Column store error" in database frequently
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We have a total database size is more than 110 GB. We have a number of licenses 120.
We have to know the required hardware specifications for Application and Database server for getting uninterrupted production environment.
Kindly provide us the details.

We are getting 'GetRecords : column store error: search table error:  [1000002] exception 1000002:' in database frequently. Kindly let us know, what is the cause of this error and how do we can overcome it?
And Please let us know, is it possible to shrink the database size. if it is possible please tell the process steps for done it.

And we are having 512GB License memory, Peak memory reached up to 320 Gb on peak hours. When trying to cross beyond 320GB, Hana DB gets disconnected and its throw "Cannot allocate enough Memory" in HANA studio.

Due to this our daily data base backup also getting failed with "Column Store error".

Kindly help us to resolve this issue ASAP.
